_README: NOW.json — APPEND-ONLY agent sync file. Agents MAY ONLY add new entries. NEVER edit or delete existing entries. This is the immutable heartbeat log of the army. Source of truth: issue #143.

_RULES.R1: APPEND ONLY — never modify existing entries
_RULES.R2: Every agent MUST write a heartbeat entry before starting work
_RULES.R3: Every agent MUST write a completion entry after finishing
_RULES.R4: Format: { ts, agent, soul_name, issue, task, status, phi_step, next, evidence }
_RULES.R6: Links: SOUL.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md LAWS.md issue#143
_RULES.R7: NO browser — use gh CLI only

_PHI_LOOP: CLAIM → NAME → SPEC → SEAL → GEN → TEST → VERDICT → EXPERIENCE → REPORT → COMMIT → PUSH
_ARCHITECTURE: each step = tri CLI + experience/ source of truth .trinity

heartbeats.next: All agents read LAWS.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md SOUL.md NOW.json before ANY work

laws_check.L14: auditability — every heartbeat is named and traced
